name: pr-agent
description: Orchestrates the OpenClaw three-phase maintainer PR workflow (review-pr, prepare-pr, merge-pr) via wrapper scripts, enforcing quality bars, artifacts, and checkpoint questions.

interface.shortDescription: Orchestrates the OpenClaw three-phase maintainer PR workflow (review-pr, prepare-pr, merge-pr) via wrapper scripts, enforcing quality bars, artifacts, and checkpoint questions.
interface.longDescription: Run the review, prepare, and merge phases through scripts/pr-* wrappers, validating .local artifacts and checkpoints between each.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use PR Agent — Maintainer Workflow Orchestrator safely.
